targets.name: commentDelete returns the deleted comment id
deleted comment disappears from root and article connection reads

notes: Live 2025-01 capture creates a disposable moderated blog/article plus one REST-created article comment, approves the comment through Admin GraphQL, records the pre-delete comment/article graph as the parity cassette, deletes the comment through Admin GraphQL, then proves root and Article.comments connections exclude the deleted row and Article.commentsCount is decremented to zero. Direct comment(id:) after true destroy is kept in the capture for evidence, but public Admin 2025-01/2026-04 returned top-level INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR rather than a stable null payload for the destroyed id, so executable direct-null behavior is covered by focused runtime tests. Proxy replay hydrates the existing upstream comment/article graph through the cassette before staging the supported commentDelete locally.
